AuroraTimes.Headline: Tesco Buyback Advances
AuroraTimes.Summary: Tesco bought back another 1.94m shares at an average 468.38p, taking total repurchases since April to 70.6m shares worth ?322.5m. Fewer shares in issue can support earnings per share, dividend-per-share growth and long-term shareholder returns.

AuroraTimes.Headline: UK Inflation Holds at 2.8%
AuroraTimes.Summary: UK inflation came in at 2.80%, below the 3.00% forecast and 2.93% community expectation. This is positive for the Aurora income portfolio because it reduces pressure on interest rates, which can help dividend shares, REITs and infrastructure funds, while petrol, transport and energy remain watch points.
AuroraTimes.Action_Required: Monitor the next CPI print and Bank of England rate path before changing allocations.
AuroraTimes.Notes: Actual 2.80 came in better than forecast/community expectations; supports current dividend-income stance.

AuroraTimes.Headline: Tesco Q1 Sales Grow; FY27 Profit Guidance Affirmed
AuroraTimes.Summary: Tesco reported Q1 sales of ?16.83bn for the 13 weeks ended 30 May, up 2.3% year over year at actual rates and 1.0% like-for-like. FY27 group adjusted operating profit guidance was reaffirmed at ?3.0bn??3.3bn.
AuroraTimes.Action_Required: No immediate action. Monitor Tesco price reaction and confirm full trading update when available.
AuroraTimes.Notes: Positive trading update: Q1 sales growth and FY27 adjusted operating profit guidance reaffirmed. Supports Tesco confidence but no purchase action needed today.

AuroraTimes.Headline: Payday Transfer Window Completed
AuroraTimes.Summary: Purchases completed: FSFL ?200 and RGL ?100 in Trade212, plus UKW ?49.32 and ARCC ?138.21 in IG ISA. Estimated annual income added is about ?51.89.
AuroraTimes.Action_Required: Holdings, Watchlist, Global Watchlist, LivePrices, IncomeLog, AuroraFixtures and dividend tracking reviewed.
AuroraTimes.Notes: Final corrected fills: FSFL 272.47956403 shares; RGL 108.10914350 shares; UKW 47 shares in IG ISA; ARCC 10 shares in IG ISA.

AuroraFixtures.Notes: Completed: FSFL ?200 and RGL ?100 in Trade212; UKW ?49.32 and ARCC ?138.21 in IG ISA. Total deployed ?487.53.
